'''jozhamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:oatsy|oatsy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-zh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oatsy|oatsy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jozhamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jozhamithi|jozhamithi]] || [[word:jozhamiji|jozhamiji]] || [[word:jozhamishi|jozhamishi]] || [[word:jozhamiki|jozhamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jozhamuthuthu|jozhamuthuthu]] || [[word:jozhamujuju|jozhamujuju]] || [[word:jozhamushushu|jozhamushushu]] || [[word:jozhamukuku|jozhamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jozhamuthu|jozhamuthu]] || [[word:jozhamuju|jozhamuju]] || [[word:jozhamushu|jozhamushu]] || [[word:jozhamuku|jozhamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jozhamufthuf|jozhamufthuf]] || [[word:jozhamufjuf|jozhamufjuf]] || [[word:jozhamufshuf|jozhamufshuf]] || [[word:jozhamufkuf|jozhamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jozhamethe|jozhamethe]] || [[word:jozhameje|jozhameje]] || [[word:jozhameshe|jozhameshe]] || [[word:jozhameke|jozhameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jozhamothotho|jozhamothotho]] || [[word:jozhamojojo|jozhamojojo]] || [[word:jozhamoshosho|jozhamoshosho]] || [[word:jozhamokoko|jozhamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jozhamotho|jozhamotho]] || [[word:jozhamojo|jozhamojo]] || [[word:jozhamosho|jozhamosho]] || [[word:jozhamoko|jozhamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jozhamofthof|jozhamofthof]] || [[word:jozhamofjof|jozhamofjof]] || [[word:jozhamofshof|jozhamofshof]] || [[word:jozhamofkof|jozhamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jozhamïfthïf|jozhamïfthïf]] || [[word:jozhamïfjïf|jozhamïfjïf]] || [[word:jozhamïfshïf|jozhamïfshïf]] || [[word:jozhamïfkïf|jozhamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jozhamïfthïfthïf|jozhamïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:jozhamïfjïfjïf|jozhamïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:jozhamïfshïfshïf|jozhamïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:jozhamïfkïfkïf|jozhamïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jozhamïfthïf|jozhamïfthïf]] || [[word:jozhamïfjïf|jozhamïfjïf]] || [[word:jozhamïfshïf|jozhamïfshïf]] || [[word:jozhamïfkïf|jozhamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jozhamïfthïf|jozhamïfthïf]] || [[word:jozhamïfjïf|jozhamïfjïf]] || [[word:jozhamïfshïf|jozhamïfshïf]] || [[word:jozhamïfkïf|jozhamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jozhamæthæ|jozhamæthæ]] || [[word:jozhamæjæ|jozhamæjæ]] || [[word:jozhamæshæ|jozhamæshæ]] || [[word:jozhamækæ|jozhamækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jozhamathatha|jozhamathatha]] || [[word:jozhamajaja|jozhamajaja]] || [[word:jozhamashasha|jozhamashasha]] || [[word:jozhamakaka|jozhamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jozhamatha|jozhamatha]] || [[word:jozhamaja|jozhamaja]] || [[word:jozhamasha|jozhamasha]] || [[word:jozhamaka|jozhamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jozhamafthaf|jozhamafthaf]] || [[word:jozhamafjaf|jozhamafjaf]] || [[word:jozhamafshaf|jozhamafshaf]] || [[word:jozhamafkaf|jozhamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jozhamasha|jozhamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jozhamshësha|jozhamshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jozhamrosha|jozhamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jozhamusha|jozhamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jozhamyasha|jozhamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojozhamnkshësha|gojozhamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojozhamnkrosha|gojozhamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojozhamnkmusha|gojozhamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojozhamnkyasha|gojozhamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jozhazhamasha|jozhazhamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jozhazhamshësha|jozhazhamshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jozhazhamrosha|jozhazhamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jozhazhamusha|jozhazhamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jozhazhamyasha|jozhazhamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojozhazhamnkshësha|gojozhazhamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojozhazhamnkrosha|gojozhazhamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojozhazhamnkmusha|gojozhazhamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojozhazhamnkyasha|gojozhazhamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jezhæmasha|jezhæmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jezhæmshësha|jezhæmshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jezhæmrosha|jezhæmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jezhæmusha|jezhæmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jezhæmyasha|jezhæmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojezhæmnkshësha|gojezhæmnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojezhæmnkrosha|gojezhæmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojezhæmnkmusha|gojezhæmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojezhæmnkyasha|gojezhæmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jozhfamasha|jozhfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jozhfamshësha|jozhfamshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jozhfamrosha|jozhfamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jozhfamusha|jozhfamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jozhfamyasha|jozhfamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojozhfamnkshësha|gojozhfamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojozhfamnkrosha|gojozhfamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojozhfamnkmusha|gojozhfamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojozhfamnkyasha|gojozhfamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
